frame_analyses.description: Initial view of instructional materials with title 'How To Tie Surgical Knots: The Definitive Guide'
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Setup shows pink practice material with pre-drawn suture path and marks

frame_analyses.description: Instructor demonstrating proper positioning of practice material
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Shows how to secure material with binder clips for stability

frame_analyses.description: Demonstrating proper needle loading with needle driver
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Shows correct grip position at 2/3 point from needle tip

frame_analyses.description: Demonstrating needle entry through first mark
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Shows perpendicular entry angle to minimize tissue trauma

frame_analyses.description: Beginning knot tying demonstration with two-handed technique
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Shows proper hand positioning for intracorporeal knot formation

frame_analyses.description: Demonstrating alternating hand positions between throws
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clear visualization of hand dominance switching for proper knot security

confidence_rationale: This is instructional content demonstrating proper technique rather than a performance to be scored
cannot_determine: FLS score - this is educational content, not a performance
Completion time - demonstration video, not timed performance
Performance penalties - instructional material showing correct technique
technique_summary: High-quality instructional demonstration of intracorporeal suturing technique with clear visualization of key technical points

demonstrated_techniques: proper needle loading at 2/3 point from tip
perpendicular needle entry for accurate placement
single throw technique for subsequent throws
verbal_cues: Reference to 'bread & butter' and 'before strangled' terminology
common_errors_addressed: improper needle grip leading to poor control
failing to alternate hands between throws

strengths: Excellent camera angle for visualizing hand positions
Systematic approach to teaching knot fundamentals
